summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Super Admin (KX ROOT) features including login, admin management, partners CRUD, programme director, contact info, callback requests, and assessment categories with brand assignment. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all features work correctly.

backend_api_tests: Super Admin login with root@kotlerx.com / KXRoot@2024
Super Admin login rejected with wrong password
Super Admin dashboard access with stats
Regular admin denied access to super admin dashboard
Regular admin cannot create admin accounts
Get assessment categories with brand info
frontend_ui_tests: Super Admin login redirects to /super-admin panel
KX ROOT branding visible in header
All 7 tabs visible (Overview, Admins, Partners, Director, Contact, Callbacks, Assessments)
Overview tab shows dashboard stats (Admins, Brand Heads, Crew, Students, Programs, Brands, Leads, Callbacks)
Admins tab shows admin list with Create Admin button
Create Admin dialog opens with form fields
Partners tab shows Add Partner button and filter options
Partners marquee displays on landing page when partners exist
Programme Director tab shows editable form
Contact Info tab shows editable form
Callbacks tab shows callback requests list
Assessments tab shows categories with brand assignment feature
Landing page Contact section with 3 CTA buttons (Request Callback, Message Us, Contact Us)
Request Callback dialog opens and submits successfully
WhatsApp button configured with wa.me link
Programme Director section displays on landing page

super_admin_login.details: KX ROOT Super Admin (root@kotlerx.com / KXRoot@2024) can login and is redirected to /super-admin panel. Role-based redirect working correctly.

admin_management.details: Super Admin can create new admin accounts, view all admins, and delete admin accounts. Regular admins cannot access these features.

partners_crud.details: Partners/Sponsors/Associations can be created, updated, and deleted. Public endpoint returns only visible partners. Partners marquee displays on landing page.

programme_director.details: Programme Director info can be edited by admin. Public endpoint returns director info with default values if not set. Section displays on landing page.

contact_info.details: Contact info (email, phone, WhatsApp, location) can be edited by admin. Public endpoint returns contact info with defaults. Contact section displays on landing page.

callback_requests.details: Public users can submit callback requests. Requests automatically create lead entries. Admin can view all callback requests.

assessment_brand_assignment.details: Assessment categories can be assigned to multiple brands. Brand names displayed in category cards. Edit dialog allows brand selection.

landing_page_sections.details: Partners marquee (scrolling animation), Programme Director message, and Contact section with 3 CTAs all display correctly on landing page.

critical_code_review_comments: Super Admin Panel shows warning toast 'This portal is for admin only. You are logged in as super_admin' - this is informational, not an error
Partners marquee uses CSS animation for infinite scroll - works well but pauses on hover
Create Admin dialog form submission works but may need better success feedback (toast appears briefly)
seed_data_creation: Super Admin (KX ROOT) is auto-seeded on backend startup. Test partners created and cleaned up during testing.

mocked_apis.Email_sending: Resend API configured but uses placeholder key

context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin (KX ROOT) features fully tested: 1) Login with root@kotlerx.com / KXRoot@2024, 2) Admin account CRUD, 3) Partners/Sponsors CRUD with marquee display, 4) Programme Director CMS, 5) Contact Info CMS, 6) Callback Requests (creates leads), 7) Assessment Categories with brand assignment. All features working correctly. Landing page displays Partners marquee, Programme Director section, and Contact section with 3 CTA buttons.
